message:
fix(sync,runtime): remove mutex.rs orphan code and harden builder quiescence wait

- Remove orphan duplicate lines in src/sync/mutex.rs:1202-1204 that caused
  compile failure in sync module tests (orphan assertion + closing braces
  after mod tests block)
- Add PolledAfterCompletion variant to LockError and completed flag to
  LockFuture/OwnedLockFuture for fail-closed polling-after-completion
- Harden wait_for_runtime_quiescent in builder.rs with progressive backoff:
  yield_now for first 100 iterations, then 1ms sleeps, preventing flaky
  test failure on busy remote workers
- Audit batch 376: post-fix verification of 28 files from recent commits,
  all SOUND (see audit_index.jsonl)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
